name: Enterprise 4.0 Technology Acquisition Corp. Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Enterprise 4.0 Technology Acquisition Corp. is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. SPACs don't have operations until they acquire a private company, taking it public. The company is looking to merge with an existing business.
